name: manage-credentials
description: Store credentials and use them in an agent
query: I need to create an agent that uses my GitHub token. How do I set up credentials?
expected_behavior: Store credential: agentspan credentials set --name GITHUB_TOKEN
Show how to reference in agent: credentials=["GITHUB_TOKEN"]
Explain credentials are encrypted on the server
Show how to use in a tool with credentials parameter
Never hardcode the token in code
success_criteria: References credential by name in Agent definition
Never prints or hardcodes the actual token value
